codeReview.summary: The knowledge_graph.rs implementation adds typed metadata on nodes and edges with confidence (f64), evidence_count (u32), temporal validity (valid_from DateTime, valid_until Option<DateTime>), and provenance (Vec<ProvenanceReference>). Query methods support filtering by minimum confidence threshold and temporal validity range. All 13 tests pass and clippy shows no warnings.

summary: Code review of knowledge_graph.rs confirms the implementation adds typed metadata on nodes and edges: confidence (f64), evidence_count (u32), temporal validity (valid_from DateTime, valid_until Option<DateTime>), and provenance (Vec<ProvenanceReference>). Query methods query_nodes_with_metadata and query_edges_with_metadata support filtering by minimum confidence threshold and temporal validity range. Tests verify all metadata fields and query filters work correctly. The implementation passes all tests and clippy checks. Note: The mission directory was not accessible for this review, so transcript and handoff verification could not be performed.
